dict.key: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1.0"> <array> <string>Pretendard-Thin.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-SemiBold.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Light.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Medium.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Regular.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-ExtraLight.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Black.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Bold.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-ExtraBold.otf</string> </array> </plist> <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1.0"> <array> <string>Pretendard-Thin.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-SemiBold.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Light.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Medium.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Regular.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-ExtraLight.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Black.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-Bold.otf</string> <string>Pretendard-ExtraBold.otf</string> </array> </plist>
